title: Post has_many Comments — basic association
prompt: Build two Ecto schemas: MyApp.Blog.Post (fields: title, body) and MyApp.Blog.Comment (fields: body), where a Post has many Comments. Get the direction right: the foreign key lives on the comments table. Write Post to lib/my_app/blog/post.ex and Comment to lib/my_app/blog/comment.ex. Use UTC timestamps.
tier_rationale: Single has_many/belongs_to pair with obvious cardinality. Easy tier because the direction follows directly from 'a Post has many Comments'.
